name: on value_change
title: on value_change
description: The event procedure is called whenever the specified value changes. It’s not called when the value is updated, but does not change. You can use the event procedure for all values of communication objects, including e.g. signal and event values, LatestCall or LatestReturn of methods, service states, etc.

parameters.name: <value>
parameters.description: Designates the value on which the procedure shall be called.

row: ChangeTimeNS Last time the value was changed, in nanoseconds since measurement start.
UpdateTimeNS Last time the value was updated, in nanoseconds since measurement start.
